Petition To Invalidate Specific Gift In The First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe Trust; To Invalidate Donative Transfer To Son Of Care Giver; And To Determine The Construction Of Section 2.04 (B) Of First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe 2012 Trust And To Invalidate Gift For Failure To Comply With Terms Of The Trust Provision
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Jun-01-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Connors for Henry Joe (Petitioner).
Sam Wu for Guy Wen Zhong (Respondent).

Mr. Connors stated that the complication is with Mr. Wu's Client residing in China and his difficulty in coming here, and that they were thinking of a time period of May or June for trial. The Petition to Invalidate Specific Gift in the First Amendment to Declaration of Trust, etc. is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on June 1, 2020 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court/a copy of the order and notice of trial was also provided to Counsel in open Court).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Specific Gift In The First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe Trust; To Invalidate Donative Transfer To Son Of Care Giver; And To Determine The Construction Of Section 2.04 (B) Of First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe 2012 Trust And To Invalidate Gift For Failure To Comply With Terms Of The Trust Provision
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Connors for Henry Joe (Petitioner).
Sam Wu for Guo Wen Zhong (Respondent).

Mr. Connors stated that Mr. Wu's Client is in China, that Mr. Wu will work on taking his Client's deposition in late July, that Mr. Zhong will be here in September and that they plan to do mediation. Mr. Connors also stated that if the matter does not get resolved, he will do Mr. Zhong's deposition in September and then come back and get a date for trial. Mr. Wu stated that good dates are September 11th through the 18th. Both Counsel indicated that they will be doing private mediation. The Petition to Invalidate Specific Gift in the First Amendment to Declaration of Trust, etc. is continued to October 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties are to meet and confer by October 15, 2019 and provide a joint status statement as to where things stand and what needs to be done to be in a position to set the matter for trial.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Specific Gift In The First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe Trust; To Invalidate Donative Transfer To Son Of Care Giver; And To Determine The Construction Of Section 2.04 (B) Of First Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Of The Ruby K. Joe 2012 Trust And To Invalidate Gift For Failure To Comply With Terms Of The Trust Provision
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Connors for and with Henry Wing Joe.
Sam Wu for Simon Chung.

The Court stated that venue looks appropriate, that it would still need to look at the underlying petition, and that it would also want to obtain the Probate Examiner's input. Mr. Connors stated that some discovery has been done, that there is a bit more to do, that they may be ready to set a case management conference, that Mr. Wu's client is in China, and that they would need at least ninety days. The Court continued the matter to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a either a referral to mediation or trial setting. A status update is to be filed prior to June 25, 2019. The Court inquired about pro bono mediation. Mr. Connors stated that only one of the properties is at issue so pro bono mediation may be appropriate.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.
